name: IdsEdwMdlPolCertDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_input AS (SELECT MDL_POL_CERT_SK, MDL_DOC_ID, POL_NO, CERT_ID, CERT_EFF_DT, SRC_SYS_CD, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, MDL_DOC_SK, CERT_EFF_ON_GRP_RNWL_IN, CERT_STTUS_ID, CERT_TERM_DT FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.MDL_POL_CERT WHERE LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK >= @{pipeline().parameters.IDSRunCycle}), cte_final AS (SELECT cte_input.MDL_POL_CERT_SK AS MDL_POL_CERT_SK, cte_input.MDL_DOC_ID AS MDL_DOC_ID, cte_input.POL_NO AS POL_NO, cte_input.CERT_ID AS CERT_ID, cte_input.CERT_EFF_DT AS CERT_EFF_DT, cte_input.SRC_SYS_CD AS SRC_SYS_CD, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, cte_input.MDL_DOC_SK AS MDL_DOC_SK, cte_input.CERT_EFF_ON_GRP_RNWL_IN AS CERT_EFF_ON_GRP_RNWL_IN, cte_input.CERT_STTUS_ID AS CERT_STTUS_ID, cte_input.CERT_TERM_DT AS CERT_TERM_DT, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, cte_input.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK AS IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM cte_input) SELECT * FROM cte_final
